description: Style Note  only sure knows how to keep up with the trends. These black trousers with their comfort Fit and casual look can be worn with a tank top and flat sandals for a casually appealing look. Product Details  Black trousers, has a ribbed elasticated waistband with drawstring tie, tape detail below the waistband, two insert pockets in front with gathers on it, a patch pocket on the right at the back with a buttoned closure and drawstring ties at the hemline    Material and Care  40% cotton, 40% linen and 20% viscose  Machine wash warm with like colours  Do not bleach or tumble dry  Use cool iron Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 36 Style Note ONLY sure knows how to keep up with the trends.
